title: Windows Security Administration
description:
Windows Security Administration

Windows Security Administration

Users need Administrator rights to use the Epson RC+ 8.0. Other users such as Power User, Limited User, Guest User cannot use Epson RC+ 8.0.

To provide security within the Epson RC+ 8.0 environment, a Security software option is available. This option allows you to manage Epson RC+ 8.0 users and audit development activity. For details, refer to Security.
